programme.desc: The girls reunite; Flo's anger leads to a table-flipping showdown; hosted by Perez Hilton.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: Flo gets to the root of her anger; a decision is made; Portia and Natalie face off one last time.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: After moving into their new place in Miami, some try to get rid of a snobby housemate.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Morgan battles to keep her place in the house; Kristen sabotages Lea's birthday party.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Cat and Kristen make Erica's life hell; Lea must choose which man.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: A new Bad Girl finds a mentor in Kristen.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Layton, Utah, Jon confronts Brandon, the emotionally exhausted owner of Linda Lou's Time for Two, who has bled himself and his mother dry trying to keep the bar open.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Midvale, Utah, to meet The Union owner Bill, who is over $500,000 in debt and hasn't picked up any of the bar knowledge required to help his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in New Mexico to help Mike, the owner of Lucky 66 Bowl, who is over a million dollars in debt and keeps driving customers and employees out the door with his temper.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits Tracy, California, to help the divorced owners of Grant Bar & Lounge clean up their act and bring cohesion to their competing nightclub/restaurant concept.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the owner of Jolt'n Joe's in San Diego was diagnosed with cancer, he began leaning on his manager, but a broken promise over equity threatens to run the bar into the ground.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon, joined by rapper T-Pain, is in Sacramento, California, to convince Kings fan Chris he needs to change his sports bar concept if he's ever going to make money.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to Orange County, California, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 295: Stots vs. Mix was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on April 22, 2023, at the Neal S. Blaisdell Arena in Honolulu, Hawaii, United States.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 296: Mousasi vs. Edwards was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on May 12, 2023, at Accor Arena in Paris, France.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 298: Storley vs. Ward was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on August 11, 2023, at the Sanford Pentagon in Sioux Falls, South Dakota, United States.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 299: Eblen vs. Edwards was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA, that took place on September 23, 2023, at the 3Arena in Dublin, Ireland.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather says husband Anthony put rubbing alcohol in her contact lens case, which he denies. Anthony says he does have anger issues after returning from Iraq & admits to abuse of Heather's dog. Robin McGraw issues a strong warning about domestic violence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child abductions are a reality, & friends, neighbors & even relatives can kidnap your youngster. Two victims share heart-wrenching stories of abduction & how they were returned to their families. Find out what you need to know to keep your child safe!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After 21 years, Paula is considering divorcing husband, Jeremy, saying he's "clueless, absent & non-verbal." Jeremy says it's Paula--controlling & a grudge-holder. Find out Jeremy's mistake. Dr. Phil and Robin share the secret to their 45-year marriage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a beautiful mother of two, vanished in 2009. Her husband, Josh, was considered a person of interest & what began as an unsolved mystery tragically ended with the murder-suicide of Josh Powell & their two sons, Charles, 7, & Braden, 5.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Drysdale eagerly prepares to set up the deal for a new airline formed by Jed and farmer Howard Hewes, thinking him the famous millionaire Howard Hughes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies unsuccessfully conspire to get Shorty Kellems married to Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elusive Shorty Kellems gets off the marital hook by convincing his eager bride-to-be that he is an inveterate gambler.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Shad Heller discover it's a full time job keeping Shorty Kellems corralled until his marriage to the indomitable Elverna.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed prepares to underwrite con man Honest John's scheme to drill a channel in the mountains to draw off the smog in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies plan to go to Washington to give the President their $95,000,000 fortune to help fight air pollution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Romance enters Elly May's life in a big way when Navy Lt. Mark Templeton arrives at the Clampett mansion to pay a visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny consults a psychiatrist to give "modern medicine" a chance to keep frogman Mark Templeton from turning into a real frog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny battles to keep her family out of the swimming pool, convinced that if they get wet they'll turn into frogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny invites Shorty Kellems back from the hills to help break up Elly May's romance with Mark Templeton.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny thinks Shorty Kellems has turned into a seal because he ignored her warnings about swimming in the Clampett pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is finally convinced that Elly May's boyfriend, Mark Templeton, is a human being -- not half-frog as she first suspected.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Granny, Elly May, and Jethro man the front lines against an expected invasion of grunion, which they believe to be hostile aliens.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies, encouraged by Mr. Drysdale, continue to guard the Malibu beach and repel the mythical Grunion invaders.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E020) Andrea launches a campaign to create awareness about AIDS and other STDs at West Beverly and finds herself going up against some powerful opponents.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E021) Kelly's loose lips let slip an explosive secret that almost destroys her mother's relationship with Mel.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E022) Dylan's attempts to help a friend through AA put a serious strain on his relationship with Brenda.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E024) Brandon's father becomes involved in a lucrative real estate deal - until Brandon discovers that if the deal goes through, Nat will lose the Peach Pit.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E025) A robbery at the Peach Pit leaves Brenda more traumatized than she's willing to admit - especially when she must identify her attacker in a police lineup.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E026) David leads Brenda, Kelly, and Donna to the Bel Age Hotel on a mission to meet the pop group 'Color Me Badd' when they come to town.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E028) When the Taylor house suddenly floods from a ruptured water pipe, the Walshes reluctantly agree to host Mel and Jackie's wedding at theirs.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E001) Summer vacation begins and Brenda starts lying to her parents to see Dylan. Brandon starts his summer job at the Beach Club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E002) The Walsh's become upset over Brenda's relationship with Dylan, and Steve gets himself into a jam with twins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E003) Brenda and Donna arrive in Paris while Dylan struggles with his father's plan to gain parole from prison.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E004) While Donna works as a model in Paris, David wonders whether his heart belongs to Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E005) Brenda pretends to be French to spend time with an American student in Paris.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E006) Brenda and Donna return from Paris, and Brenda suspects that Dylan may have been romantically involved with Kelly during the summer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S03E007) It's back to school and trouble arises when Brenda, Steve, and Donna sign up to be "senior buddies".

programme.desc: A man who previously brought his now-fiancée to Paternity Court stands accused of being unfaithful himself by the fiancée, his ex and even his mother.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: Relationships are on the line because a woman suspects her boyfriend is sleeping with her best friend.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: A married man has another woman waiting in the wings in the event that the court finds his wife is cheating.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers
programme.desc: Suspicious and flirty behavior have led a woman to believe her boyfriend and her mother may be having an affair.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: Thirty years of living in lies and secrecy come to a screeching halt when a desperate mother brings her ex-fling to court to learn the truth about who fathered her daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: He took her virginity before passing away, and now a young woman is in court to prove to her ex-lover's family that he fathered her child.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court
programme.desc: After hearing sex noises coming from his ex-girlfriend's house, a man now questions the paternity of her child.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A mysterious caller leads police to a body at the bottom of a pond; guests Steve Kanaly, Shannon Eubanks.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer LuAnn Corbin (Crystal Fox) tries to help when her boyfriend (Willie Gault) is blackmailed by a drug dealer (Judson Vaughn).

programme.title: Nothing to Lose
programme.desc: A dispirited white ad executive (Tim Robbins) teams up with a black car-jacker (Martin Lawrence) for a crime spree.

programme.title: Da Kink in My Hair
programme.desc: Dre recruits Joy and Letty to convince their landlord to let Dre date his daughter.

programme.title: Da Kink in My Hair
programme.desc: Starr's relationship with Julian hits a roadblock when he makes a homophobic remark.

programme.desc: When business manager Gage decides to hire an assistant, Jeff brings in a "ringer" to help him out.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage decide to use an egg donor and a surrogate to help them realize their dream of having a baby.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: While Jeff and his crew organize an epic furniture catalog shoot, he and Gage decide to put their dream home on the market.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: When the design team puts the finishing touches on George Eads' residence, it finds out the "CSI" actor has a sensitive side; Jeff needs to find his own place in which to live and work, but a rainstorm threatens to wash away his plans.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and his team settle into their new Hollywood office, but personnel issues follow them to their new space; Jeff strives to keep his current clients happy even though Joe is off his game and Vanina has lost her focus.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: From failing to adequately mourn the loss of their cat to stressing out over the move, things start to go wrong for Jeff and Gage, and tensions build to an unbearable pitch.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: While Jeff and Gage meet the woman who will carry their baby for the first time, Jeff starts to have second thoughts due to the constant bickering between Gage and Zoila.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: After his business takes an unexpected turn, Jeff Lewis is determined to find new clients, and he faces bigger challenges than ever before; Jeff causes upheaval by moving the gang into a flip that is still under construction.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage head to the doctor's office with their surrogate, Alexandra, for the implantation of their embryos; Jenni strives to keep a new client happy while heading to her first parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage finally receive the happy news that Alexandra is pregnant; Jeff struggles to keep his longstanding client, Chaz Dean, happy; Jeff wonders if his new assistant, Ashlyn, wants to remain with the company.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Attempting to diversify his business, Jeff heads to San Diego to meet with a new client who has million-dollar condominiums; Jenni reveals that she and her husband have decided to have a second baby; problems arise with Jeff's contractor, Frank.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff struggles to please his client, forcing him to make a difficult decision; after constant bickering, Jeff and Gage try to reconnect and listen to their unborn child's heartbeat at Alexandra's first ultrasound.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff explores forming a partnership with a furniture company; stress mounts as the team realizes it has to impress the entire family behind the retailer; Jenni struggles with fertility issues as Jeff and Gage look forward to the birth of their baby.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff gets more clients and believes his luck has turned around; Jeff begins to suspect that Gage's assistant, Matt, may be leaving JLD; the pressure of living in a house under construction takes a toll on one of Jeff's longstanding relationship.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Zoila takes a weeklong leave of absence after a series of mistakes pushes Jeff to his breaking point; Jeff consults with his therapist, Dr. Donna, and admits his worries over having to balance his business with a new baby girl.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: Jeff's paternal instincts kick in when ducklings show up in the backyard; Gage tries to pick up the slack after Matt's resignation; Jeff and Gage face problems with their architect; Jenni switches to in vitro fertilization.

programme.title: Flipping Out

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un altamente clasificado vehículo robotizado llamado Otto causa la muerte de una teniente de la Marina, Gibbs y el equipo analizan si se trata de un suicidio o un homicidio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo se dirigen velozmente a una escena del crimen donde un oficial de inteligencia de alto nivel fue asesinado, descubriendo que el crimen sucedió tres días antes y fue "investigado" por autoridades locales.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de la pérdida de 10 kilogrmos de armas químicas altamente tóxicas, Gibbs y su equipo luchan por localizarlas. El equipo de NCIS se horroriza cuando descubren que las armas químicas están en posesión de un buscado terrorista llamado Mamoun Sharif.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es baleado por un miembro de una banda rival en el patio de su escuela, Danny y Baez intentan controlar la situación para evitar más incidentes, pero el director, Darryl Ward (Ernie Hudson), actúa imprudentemente por su cuenta.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en aceptar un nuevo trabajo que podría resolver sus problemas financieros después de investigar la muerte de un hombre rico.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pursuit ends with the suspect on a roof, a driver calls deputies when a pedestrian loses his cool, and a relationship is jeopardized when a man results to illegal habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A loitering suspect flees when approached by police, and a traffic stop leaves a woman concerned for the future of her marriage.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A first-time offender brings officers on an intense car chase, deputies respond to an armed robbery, and a routine traffic stop ends in multiple arrests.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in a stolen vehicle sends officers on a high-speed chase, deputies confront a driver asleep at the wheel, and a trespassing call becomes a neighborhood-wide ordeal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unruly man gives deputies a hard time, witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver plows through multiple barricades, and a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An injured suspect spots his window of opportunity, a man tries to order officers around who caught him with unsavory items, and detectives catch someone in a sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies respond to an armed carjacking, an altercation leads to a woman's arrest, and officers face a combative man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicycle chase leads to a bizarre reunion between an officer and suspect, police respond to a domestic dispute, and officers respond to a suspicious vehicle in a local park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man suspected of shoplifting attempts to ditch his clothes, and officers respond to a dispute between a shopkeeper and a man suspected of paying with counterfeit money.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers prevent a potential home invasion when they arrest a wanted man, a passenger becomes defensive during a traffic stop, and officers help a teen recover a stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist sends officers on a frantic foot-chase through a neighborhood, and when searching a building, police find a woman hiding in a cupboard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control driver wants to get home for his child's birthday, officers respond to a suspected shooting, and a trip to buy dog food turns into a run-in with the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers step in when a man's erratic behavior sparks concern in a neighborhood, and a wanted suspect is convinced an officer told him to take off on his bicycle.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods. Grissom, Sarah, and Greg try to determine how a man was killed in a hotel room. It leads them to a convention of big women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car showgirl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a mental-hospital patient and quickly narrow down the suspects to a handful of other patients and staff members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man (Alan Rosenberg) whom Catherine flirted with at a bar reappears in her life as a suspect in a murder investigation of a woman who was shot and killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom y el resto de los CSI están fuera investigando nuevos casos, Hodges hace creer a Archie, Henry, Mandy y Wendy que Grissom quiere que se unan en secreto esa noche para intentar resolver los cuatro casos de asesinos en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En su intento por identificar al asesino de un ex boxeador que vivía entre un grupo de prostitutas que lo detestaban, los CSI deben establecer cuál de los varios actos que pusieron en peligro su vida en una noche realmente lo mató.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una crupier de blackjack cuyo marido, separado de ella, tiene vínculos con un club de creyentes en los ovnis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A Sara le inquieta que Grissom se reúna con Lady Heather durante la investigación de los CSI sobre su intento de asesinato por parte de un cliente al que se niega a nombrar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI se acerca más que nunca a la identificación del asesino en miniatura, Sara desaparece misteriosamente, lo que obliga a sacar a la luz su relación con Grissom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After Horatio captures the last prison escapee, their transport plane crash lands, and they discover the fugitive has more planned than a getaway.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Natalia’s lives hang in the balance as Horatio stands between Natalia and certain death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs are led into the sexy world of male gigolos when they uncover an unusual murder weapon.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tornado touches down on a murder scene, damaging the evidence and putting Ryan and Walter in grave danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team chases a sadistic killer who takes women’s eyes, and a new nemesis challenges Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protects a Mexican police chief from the mysterious assassin who killed her husband.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In a deserted mansion, the CSIs find a body hanging that appears to have been killed by a vampire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an entire family disappears into thin air, Horatio vows to find them, dead or alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs expose the seedy underbelly of children’s beauty pageants when a contestant's mom is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Walter Resden, el criminal archienemigo de Horatio desde hace mucho tiempo, sale a la superficie una vez más y Caine está decidido a finalmente llevarlo ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex hace campaña contra un delincuente sexual que se muda a su vecindario y se ve envuelto en una controversia cuando asesinan al hombre poco tiempo después.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lo que comienza como un caso de aparente violencia al volante lleva al equipo de CSI a la investigación de un collar robado de cuatro millones de dólares, que está vinculado a un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un supremacista blanco es absuelto por el asesinato de su esposa después de enterarse de que ella es mestiza, depende de Horatio hundir al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una banda de pistoleros enmascarados invade un spa exclusivo, con los lujosos autos de las clientas como botín. Un cliente se hiere en la pelea.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de dos hombres, ejecutados a tiros, son descubiertos en un hotel abandonado programado para ser demolido. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una llamada de teléfono celular lleva al equipo a investigar un secuestro que, a menos que lleguen a la víctima antes de que sea demasiado tarde, pronto podría convertirse en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran electrocutada en su bañera durante una fiesta a una joven heredera ultraglamurosa y querida de los medios, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la desaparición de un pasajero de un crucero, el equipo descubre que también ha ocurrido un asesinato en el barco.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está en alerta máxima cuando la pandilla mortal Mala Noche inicia un tiroteo durante el juicio de uno de sus miembros.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La búsqueda Antonio Riaz por parte de Horacio continúa. Los federales se hacen cargo del laboratorio e investigan a cada miembro del equipo cuando faltan 12.000 dólares de una redada de drogas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En busca del asesino de Marisol, Horatio y Delko van a Brasil para vengar su muerte. En Río, están cerca de atrapar a Riaz, el asesino de Marisol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Al un modelo ser asesinado, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben integrarse al mundo del modelaje para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una celebridad es asesinada en una fiesta de famosos, el equipo de CSI descubre una plancha falsa que produce billetes de cien dólares. Horatio investiga.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The witness to a brutal elevator slaying has disappeared, and as the CSIs track her down they uncover the world of Manhattan “Lolitas.”

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio Caine follow the evidence from steamy Miami to steely New York as they close in on Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, the CSIs work to find out why what they thought was a cheater’s revenge was misidentification.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll “hospital”, Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll “doctor” beneath hundreds of body parts – doll body parts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A rising roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a bout, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate the death.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El reinando de la incertidumbre (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a cuatro víctimas muertas en una habitación de hotel y el principal sospechoso aparece empuñando un hacha, el equipo de CSI intenta reconstruir los detalles.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La olla de oro (S6 Ep 17)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a dos jóvenes periodistas muertos en la víspera del Día de San Patricio, el equipo de CSI intenta encontrar la pista al final del arco iris.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Descansa en paz, Marina Garito (S6 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer, la evidencia y la autopsia sugieren suicidio, pero Stella no está convencida y arriesga su vida para continuar con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redención (S6 Ep19)
programme.desc: El último pedido de un condenado a muerte lleva a Hawkes a una cárcel de Pensilvania y se enfrenta a un secreto personal justo cuando estalla un motín en la prisión.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sospechosos inesperados (S6 Ep20)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Desde el subsuelo (S6 Ep21)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto de vista (S6 Ep22)

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York sigue un rastro que dejó Shane Casey y se da cuenta de que por venganza, él tiene en la mira a Danny, que está de vacaciones.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Piso 34 (S7 Ep1)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York encuentra un cuerpo en un tejado y debe encontrar al asesino que está manipulando la escena del crimen.

programme.desc: Cuando los bomberos encontraron a una familia entera muerta dentro de su casa, parecía un asesinato-suicidio, pero había varias pistas inconsistentes entre los escombros.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nicole Rae Walker, de 6 años de edad, murió en un choque donde el culpable se dio a la fuga en su Vecindario de Ft. Lauderdale.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este caso internacional de extorsión, asesinato e identidades robadas, el estafador Albert J. Walker asume la identidad del compañero de trabajo, Ronald Platt. Platt luego aparece muerto en un océano con un ancla atada alrededor de su torso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una mordidita
programme.desc: En la escena de un crimen, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato, varios pelos extraños y huellas dactilares desconocidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 47 hopefuls learn the mechanics of the kickline, a rookie's injuries put her out of commission, and choreographer Evan Miller teaches a dance routine that calls for power and precision.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Makeovers give the dancers renewed confidence, alum Yuko shares exciting personal news, veteran Lisa makes a hard decision, and Kelli questions Alora-Rose about a rumored distraction.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week nine of training camp intensifies when Kelli and Judy confront Alora-Rose and deliberate squad dismissal decisions one week before the first game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds will audition but only 45 girls will secure a spot in the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp. DCC director Kelli Finglass presides over the process with a keen eye for talent and beauty.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp gets underway as the girls are introduced to a grueling schedule of dance rehearsals with choreographer Judy Trammell and fitness instructor Jay Johnson.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.
